description: Lưu Thiên Mã contributes to career and social only via existing domain-palace mapping (palace-context activation). Polarity mode contextual-activation; magnitude 1.

assumptions.statement: Palace-context activation means the star contributes only when physically located in a career/social mapped palace (existing V0.8 matcher behavior).
Contextual-activation labels movement prominence without inventing a separate negative polarity engine.

expectedEffects: Same mechanical binding as career+social with explicit palace-context labeling
knownRisks: May not differentiate enough for selection
